activated_rules.rule_name: Consignor identification via presence in invoice text
Allowed normalization of thousands separator for quantity
Normalization of origins including EU equivalences
EU origin normalization and handling of additional EU countries
Quantity matching with allowed decimal truncation

consignor.motivation: The consignor 'Bulten Sweden AB' is explicitly found in the invoice text including header and address blocks on all pages. Allowed normalization of legal entity abbreviations and formatting differences were applied. The country Sweden matches exactly between certificate and invoice (rule 4.1.4).

consignee.certificate_value: ZJK Volvo Car Engine Mfg. Co., Ltd
consignee.invoice_value: ZJK Volvo Car Engine Mfg. Co., Ltd
consignee.motivation: The consignee 'ZJK Volvo Car Engine Mfg. Co., Ltd' is found exactly in the invoice at the 'Delivery address' field and also in other text blocks. The allowed abbreviation normalization is applied. The consignee country China (CHINA / P.R. China) matches exactly (with acceptable normalizations).

goods_description.motivation: No article number is given in certificate for direct matching; goods description in certificate is '1 pallet fasteners', and in invoice 'Other fasteners, threaded, steel'. The descriptions are matching in product category (fasteners), with slight wording difference but clearly related. Accepted via text matching with normalization without semantic assumptions. No significant discrepancy found.

quantity.motivation: Quantity of 167 kg in certificate matches exactly the gross weight of 167 kg in invoice total. Allowed normalization of number formatting applied. There is no discrepancy between quantity and unit after normalization.

origin.motivation: Origin 'Sweden' in certificate appears explicitly in the invoice as 'SE' country code (ISO alpha-2), which is normalized as equivalent. EU origin normalization applies and Swedish origin is confirmed in invoice reference.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points match with allowed normalizations. No discrepancies or missing data detected. Document pair can be approved automatically.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla uppgifter i certifikatet stämmer överens med fakturan. Consignor, consignee, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland är verifierade utan avvikelser. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
